label_definition.primary: stress_score_p,t = sws_hunger_t + 2 * (food_cpi_yoy_p,t - regional_mean_food_cpi_yoy_t); label_stress = 1 if stress_score > global_median
label_definition.robustness: label_cpi = 1 if food_cpi > rolling_24q_mean + 1σ for >= 2 consecutive quarters

sources.primary_label_spatial: PSA OpenStat food CPI YoY by province
sources.robustness_label: PSA OpenStat food CPI rolling deviation

fao_sdg_2_1_2_anchor.note: DOST-FNRI ENNS FIES regional baseline — NOT used in label generation. Cited as context in thesis intro to establish CALABARZON's elevated food insecurity prevalence per FAO SDG 2.1.2 methodology.
